title: Command Centre Officer – Car Park Management (Up to $2,100 + AWS + Variable Bonus / Ubi)
description:
Job Description

Position: Command Centre Officer (Car Park Management)

Well Established Singapore-Based SME

Working Days: 4 Days Work, 2 Days Rest (8am – 8pm)

Employment Type: Permanent (Full-Time)

Salary: Up to $2,100 + AWS + Variable Bonus + $70 Punctuality Allowance

Location: Ubi

Industry: Car Park Management

Job Responsibilities

  • Handle inbound/outbound calls including feedback and enquiry from Public, EMSU, HDB/Commercial Operations and Technical Team.
  • Record all feedback and incidents reported to Command Centre onto the Daily Report.
  • Check and monitor the smooth running of all automated car parks.
  • Monitor and ensure the HDB Server PCs, EHT Host and CEPAS Settlement PC are in good working condition at all times.
  • Check incoming email regularly and promptly process the work requests from HDB and other Authorities.
  • Check and monitor the working KPIs for HDB car parks and send reminder to HDB Operations Team before the cut off time.

Key Requirements

  • Minimum N-Level Certificate.
  • Basic understanding of IT systems, especially monitoring systems, server dashboards, or simple troubleshooting.
  • Minimum 1 year experience in call centre or carpark systems.
  • Able to handle public feedback.
  • Willing to work shift hours, weekends, or publicholidays, and may be required to cover night shift if duty personnel is on MC.


Email to: weeyee.ng@ascension-sg.com for more information.


***We do not charge our candidates any referral fee nor bind them with any contract. ***


Ng Wee Yee

Recruitment Consultant

Reg no.: R1982999

EA No: R25157837

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Businesses Through Integrated HR Solutions

Founded in Singapore in 2025, Ascension Advisory Pte Ltd is a trusted human resource solutions provider committed to helping organizations enhance their HR and business operations. We offer a comprehensive suite of reliable and scalable HR services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients.

From inception to implementation, we partner closely with our clients, focusing on understanding their goals, developing effective strategies, and delivering high-quality solutions. Backed by the extensive knowledge and experience of our consultants, our mission is to drive long-term, sustainable results.

Our Areas of Expertise:
1) Recruitment & Executive Search
2) Foreign Manpower Solutions
3) Temporary & Contract Manpower Solutions
4) Human Resource Advisory & Consultancy
5) HR Business Process Outsourcing (BPO)
6) Learning & Development Consultancy
7) Corporate & Employee Insurance Consultancy

Let us be your partner in building a stronger, more agile workforce.
